name: fine-tunes registry validator rejects an entry missing the required artifact_id field
command: mkdir -p prompts && printf 'fine_tunes:\n  - {base_model: sonnet, training_data: ds-1}\n' > prompts/fine-tunes.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/prompts/validate-fine-tunes.sh" --registry prompts/fine-tunes.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'missing.*artifact_id' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
